## Summary

-

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run smoke:v1`
- [ ] `npm run smoke:browser`
- [ ] `npm run secrets:check`
- [ ] `npm run deploy:dry-run`

## Hidden Information

- [ ] Public views do not reveal hidden roles before endgame.
- [ ] Tokens, token hashes, socket tickets, and private views are not logged or returned from public endpoints.
